name: Hot Crab Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Crab meat (7 1/2 oz.), drained, flaked and cartilage removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt 4 tablespoons butter. Add flour and stir until smooth.
2. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and bubbles.
3. Stir in crab meat, chopped eggs, pimiento, salt (1 teaspoon), and pepper (1/8 teaspoon).
4. Spoon the mixture into six individual casserole dishes or baking shells.
5. Melt remaining 2 tablespoons butter. Toss bread crumbs with slivered almonds until combined.
6. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the crab mixture in each dish.
7. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until set and lightly browned.
